summary: Admin-only board permissions and 2-step delete confirmation modal VERIFIED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (POST/DELETE require admin - 403 for non-admin). Frontend: Admin sees create/delete buttons, non-admin does NOT see them. Delete modal has Step 1 (AlertTriangle icon, warning banner) and Step 2 (pulsing Trash2 icon, 'Confirmacion Final'). All cancel flows work correctly.

feature_tested.name: Admin-only Board Create/Delete + 2-Step Delete Modal
requirements: ONLY admin users can create/delete boards
Deleting a board shows visually prominent double-confirmation modal
Step 1: Warning with AlertTriangle icon, 'Esta accion no se puede deshacer'
Step 2: Final confirmation with pulsing Trash icon, 'Eliminar definitivamente' button

frontend_components.delete-board-btn: Only visible when user.role === 'admin' AND board not in [MASTER, COMPLETOS, PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE]
frontend_components.cancel-delete-final: Step 2 cancel - closes modal without deleting
frontend_components.confirm-delete-final: Final delete - calls API and navigates to MASTER

frontend_playwright.admin_dashboard_load: PASS - Admin user sees dashboard with admin label
frontend_playwright.delete_board_btn_admin: PASS - data-testid='delete-board-btn' visible for admin on non-system boards
frontend_playwright.create_board_btn_non_admin: PASS - Button NOT present for non-admin
frontend_playwright.delete_board_btn_non_admin: PASS - Button NOT present for non-admin
frontend_playwright.step1_alert_triangle_icon: PASS - AlertTriangle icon present in modal
frontend_playwright.step1_warning_text: PASS - 'Esta accion no se puede deshacer' displayed
frontend_playwright.step2_pulsing_animation: PASS - animate-pulse class present on trash icon container
frontend_playwright.cancel_step2_closes_modal: PASS - Clicking 'No, conservar tablero' closes modal
frontend_playwright.delete_final_completes: PASS - Board deleted, navigates to MASTER, toast shows success
frontend_playwright.system_boards_no_delete_btn: PASS - MASTER and COMPLETOS do not show delete button

critical_code_review_comments: Admin-only permissions correctly implemented using require_admin middleware
Frontend correctly checks user.role === 'admin' via isAdmin computed property
2-step delete modal uses shadcn Dialog component with proper state management (deleteBoardConfirm.step)
Step 1 shows AlertTriangle icon with red/destructive styling and warning banner
Step 2 shows pulsing (animate-pulse) Trash2 icon with 'Confirmacion Final' text
Cancel at any step resets state to null and closes modal
Only 'Eliminar definitivamente' button calls the delete API
System boards (MASTER, COMPLETOS, PAPELERA DE RECICLAJE) protected on both frontend and backend
seed_data_creation: Created admin user and regular user sessions for permission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin-only board permissions fully working. POST /api/config/boards and DELETE /api/config/boards/{name} both return 403 for non-admin users. Frontend hides create/delete buttons for non-admin users using {isAdmin && ...} conditional. Delete confirmation is a 2-step dialog modal - Step 1 shows AlertTriangle with warning, Step 2 shows pulsing Trash2 with 'Confirmacion Final'. Both steps have cancel options. System boards cannot be deleted even by admin.
